retry_reason: Retry reasoning is not about refcount; if the fallback wait fails due to timeout/interrupt, the caller may decide to retry based on overall use case, but this is not a refcount wrapper.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to add a fence reference to a user queue wait list when space is available, or fall back to synchronous wait when the list is full. This mixed logic (get vs. wait) and the capacity check go well beyond pure reference-count management.
judge.retry_reason: Retry reasoning is not about refcount; if the fallback wait fails due to timeout/interrupt, the caller may decide to retry based on overall use case, but this is not a refcount wrapper.
